basic_details.job_title: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Individual Consultant (Bridge Design Engineer / Design Review Engineer / Bridge Design Specialist)
basic_details.short_information: RITES Limited is a multi-disciplinary engineering and consultancy organisation that provides services across transport infrastructure, buildings, and related technologies. Through this notification, RITES Ltd invites applications from experienced civil engineering professionals for engagement as Individual Consultants on a CV-based, contractual basis.

application_fee.details: There is no application fee for any of the posts under RITES Recruitment 2026. The fee for all categories is Nil.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit for all four categories under RITES Recruitment 2026 is 60 years. No extension of engagement will be given beyond the age of 65 years, even for consultants who are subsequently granted annual extensions.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for any of the four RITES Individual Consultant categories must satisfy the educational qualification, experience, and age criteria described below. Eligibility is reckoned as on the last date of application submission, i.e., 26 July 2026. | All four categories require a B.E. or B.Tech degree in Civil Engineering. Where a specialisation is claimed as part of the qualifying degree, candidates must submit a certificate from their university or institution clearly specifying that specialisation. | All categories require a total of 7 years of post-qualification experience. A minimum of 5 years of specific experience in bridge design, modelling, and analysis is required, using software such as MIDAS, Sofistik, or STAAD depending on the category. Relevant project experience includes major river bridges, ROBs, flyovers, underpasses, and grade separators on highway projects. | The upper age limit for all four categories under RITES Recruitment 2026 is 60 years. No extension of engagement will be given beyond the age of 65 years, even for consultants who are subsequently granted annual extensions.

vacancy_details.Details: Sr. Bridge Design Engineer / Main Bridge (04 Lane Extradosed Cable Stayed)

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation of Cable Stayed / Extradosed Cable Stayed Bridge using MIDAS and/or Sofistik
Major River Bridges, ROBs, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects
Sr. Bridge Design Specialist for Viaduct and other structures

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure and substructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation using STAAD, MIDAS and/or Sofistik
River Bridges, Grade Separators, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation of Cable Stayed / Extradosed Cable Stayed Bridge using MIDAS and/or Sofistik
Major River Bridges, ROBs, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects
Sr. Bridge Design Specialist for Viaduct and other structures

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure and substructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation using STAAD, MIDAS and/or Sofistik
River Bridges, Grade Separators, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects

salary_details.yp/63/26: Sr. Bridge Design Engineer / Main Bridge
salary_details.details: Payment will be released within one week after completion of each month, based on recorded attendance. Individual Consultants are entitled to payment for services only and are not eligible for statutory benefits such as PF, ESI, or Gratuity. Applicable Income Tax will be deducted at source, and GST, where applicable, will be admissible to the consultant. If the contract exceeds one year, remuneration may be reviewed annually based on the escalation received in the client's fee.

selection_process: The selection process for RITES Individual Consultant posts consists of the following stages:
Online Application: Candidates submit their application through the RITES career portal. Document Scrutiny/Verification: Eligible candidates are provisionally allowed to appear for document scrutiny
where educational and experience claims are verified against original documents. Interview: Shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview
where they are evaluated on technical skills
and communication and interpersonal skills. The mode of selection is Interview only.
results (Suitable/Not Found Suitable) will be uploaded on the RITES website along with the post name
and candidate name as recommended by the selection committee. Since the engagement is for deployment at a client site
an offer letter will be issued only after the client approves the shortlisted candidate's CV
and actual deployment remains subject to project award and company requirement.
how_to_apply: Visit the official RITES website at www.rites.com and go to the Career section.
Check the eligibility criteria carefully before applying, as eligibility is the candidate's own responsibility.
Fill in the online registration form with accurate personal, educational, and experience details.
Note down the system-generated Registration Number for all future correspondence with RITES.
Carefully fill in identity proof details, ensuring the same document is available for later verification stages.
Upload clear and visible scanned copies of all required documents.
Submit the application. Note that applications cannot be altered once submitted.
Print and sign a copy of the submitted application form, and carry it along with self-attested photocopies and original documents at the time of document verification/interview.

Candidates can apply for any number of vacancies but must ensure a valid email ID is used, since RITES will not be responsible for bounced emails. Hard copies of documents should not be sent by post or courier.
important_instructions: Merely submitting an application or documents does not guarantee an interview call or selection. RITES reserves the right to cancel, restrict, enlarge, modify, or alter the selection process at any stage without notice. The number of vacancies may vary from what is advertised. Candidates currently employed can join RITES only after being properly relieved from their parent organisation. Furnishing false information or suppressing material facts can lead to cancellation of candidature, even after engagement. Any corrigendum or addendum will be published only on www.rites.com; candidates should check the website regularly. No TA/DA is admissible for attending the interview, or for joining or completing the assignment. Retired government servants can be engaged only through a competitive process, for specific tasks and duration, and not against regular vacant posts. Queries, if any, should be sent only to [email protected] along with the VC number, registration/roll number, candidate's full name in block letters, and a valid email address.

content_sections.heading: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: RITES Limited is a multi-disciplinary engineering and consultancy organisation that provides services across transport infrastructure, buildings, and related technologies. Through this notification, RITES Ltd invites applications from experienced civil engineering professionals for engagement as Individual Consultants on a CV-based, contractual basis.

rows.details: RITES Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise)
Individual Consultant (Bridge Design Engineer / Design Review Engineer / Bridge Design Specialist)

content_sections.heading: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Document scrutiny and interviews will be conducted either in person at the RITES Corporate Office, Shikhar, Plot No. 01, Sector-29, Gurugram-122001, or through video conferencing/online. The link for online participation will be shared with candidates on their registered email ID or official chat group.

rows.event: Last date to submit online application

content_sections.heading: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The RITES Recruitment 2026 notification covers four categories of Individual Consultant posts, each with its own experience requirement, tenure, and pay. All positions are based in Kolkata, West Bengal. Note: The period spent in training (except on-the-job training), internship, teaching, academic assignments, fellowship, or PhD research shall not be counted as part of the qualifying experience.

rows.details: Sr. Bridge Design Engineer / Main Bridge (04 Lane Extradosed Cable Stayed)

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation of Cable Stayed / Extradosed Cable Stayed Bridge using MIDAS and/or Sofistik
Major River Bridges, ROBs, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation of Cable Stayed / Extradosed Cable Stayed Bridge using MIDAS and/or Sofistik
Major River Bridges, ROBs, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects
Sr. Bridge Design Specialist for Viaduct and other structures

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure and substructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation using STAAD, MIDAS and/or Sofistik
River Bridges, Grade Separators, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects

Total 7 years; minimum 5 years specific experience in modelling, analysis and design of superstructure and substructure of RCC and PSC long span bridges on Pile and Well foundation using STAAD, MIDAS and/or Sofistik
River Bridges, Grade Separators, Flyovers/Underpasses related to Highway Projects

content_sections.heading: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for any of the four RITES Individual Consultant categories must satisfy the educational qualification, experience, and age criteria described below. Eligibility is reckoned as on the last date of application submission, i.e., 26 July 2026. All four categories require a B.E. or B.Tech degree in Civil Engineering. Where a specialisation is claimed as part of the qualifying degree, candidates must submit a certificate from their university or institution clearly specifying that specialisation. All categories require a total of 7 years of post-qualification experience. A minimum of 5 years of specific experience in bridge design, modelling, and analysis is required, using software such as MIDAS, Sofistik, or STAAD depending on the category. Relevant project experience includes major river bridges, ROBs, flyovers, underpasses, and grade separators on highway projects. The upper age limit for all four categories under RITES Recruitment 2026 is 60 years. No extension of engagement will be given beyond the age of 65 years, even for consultants who are subsequently granted annual extensions.

content_sections.heading: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 Salary / Payment for Services
content_sections.text: Payment will be released within one week after completion of each month, based on recorded attendance. Individual Consultants are entitled to payment for services only and are not eligible for statutory benefits such as PF, ESI, or Gratuity. Applicable Income Tax will be deducted at source, and GST, where applicable, will be admissible to the consultant. If the contract exceeds one year, remuneration may be reviewed annually based on the escalation received in the client's fee.

rows.post_name: Sr. Bridge Design Engineer / Main Bridge

content_sections.heading: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: There is no application fee for any of the posts under RITES Recruitment 2026. The fee for all categories is Nil.

content_sections.heading: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process for RITES Individual Consultant posts consists of the following stages: Online Application: Candidates submit their application through the RITES career portal. Document Scrutiny/Verification: Eligible candidates are provisionally allowed to appear for document scrutiny, where educational and experience claims are verified against original documents. Interview: Shortlisted candidates are called for a personal interview, where they are evaluated on technical skills, subject knowledge, experience, and communication and interpersonal skills. The mode of selection is Interview only. Following the interview, results (Suitable/Not Found Suitable) will be uploaded on the RITES website along with the post name, registration number, and candidate name as recommended by the selection committee. Since the engagement is for deployment at a client site, an offer letter will be issued only after the client approves the shortlisted candidate's CV, and actual deployment remains subject to project award and company requirement.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must carry self-attested photocopies along with originals of the following documents (in chronological order) for document verification/interview: One passport-size photograph High School certificate as proof of date of birth Certificates and mark sheets of all academic and professional qualifications (10th, 12th, Diploma/Graduation/Post-Graduation, as applicable) Experience certificates from previous employers supporting claims made in the application Proof of identity and address (Passport, Voter ID, Driving Licence, Aadhaar Card, etc.) PAN Card Proof of the different periods of experience claimed, if applicable Any other supporting documents For currently employed candidates, an experience certificate or joining letter along with the last three months' salary slips, or the latest Form 16, must be produced to establish continuity of employment. A checklist (Annexure-A) must also be filled in and submitted at the time of document verification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official RITES website at www.rites.com and go to the Career section. Check the eligibility criteria carefully before applying, as eligibility is the candidate's own responsibility. Fill in the online registration form with accurate personal, educational, and experience details. Note down the system-generated Registration Number for all future correspondence with RITES. Carefully fill in identity proof details, ensuring the same document is available for later verification stages. Upload clear and visible scanned copies of all required documents. Submit the application. Note that applications cannot be altered once submitted. Print and sign a copy of the submitted application form, and carry it along with self-attested photocopies and original documents at the time of document verification/interview. Candidates can apply for any number of vacancies but must ensure a valid email ID is used, since RITES will not be responsible for bounced emails. Hard copies of documents should not be sent by post or courier.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Merely submitting an application or documents does not guarantee an interview call or selection. RITES reserves the right to cancel, restrict, enlarge, modify, or alter the selection process at any stage without notice. The number of vacancies may vary from what is advertised. Candidates currently employed can join RITES only after being properly relieved from their parent organisation. Furnishing false information or suppressing material facts can lead to cancellation of candidature, even after engagement. Any corrigendum or addendum will be published only on www.rites.com; candidates should check the website regularly. No TA/DA is admissible for attending the interview, or for joining or completing the assignment. Retired government servants can be engaged only through a competitive process, for specific tasks and duration, and not against regular vacant posts. Queries, if any, should be sent only to [email protected] along with the VC number, registration/roll number, candidate's full name in block letters, and a valid email address.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 26 July 2026, until 11:00 PM (23:00 hours).

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered under RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The monthly payment for services ranges from Rs 2,00,000 to Rs 2,25,000, depending on the post and category applied for.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for all four categories is 60 years, with no extension of engagement permitted beyond 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for RITES Individual Consultant posts?
faq.answer: No, the application fee for all categories under this recruitment is Nil.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is done through document scrutiny/verification followed by a personal interview. There is no written examination.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the RITES Individual Consultant posts be located?
faq.answer: All advertised posts under this notification are located in Kolkata, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q7. Are Individual Consultants entitled to PF, ESI, or Gratuity?
faq.answer: No. Individual Consultants are entitled to payment for their services only and are not eligible for statutory benefits such as PF, ESI, or Gratuity.
